name: pokemon-builder
description: Equinox v1.0.3 competitive and scenario-aware Pokémon team builder API

scripts.prod:check: npm run preflight && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.release:check: npm run preflight && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.preflight: npm run typecheck && npm run data:check && npm run format:check && npm run synergy:check && npm run recommendation:check && npm run balance:check
scripts.release:build: npm run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
